title: Support typedef of parameterized structure in interface

features.name: parameterized struct inside interface
features.description: Code should include a struct typedef defined inside an interface that uses interface parameters

features.name: typedef aliasing struct from interface instance path
features.description: Code should include a typedef inside a module that aliases a struct type accessed through an interface instance path using dot notation

features.name: interface instance as module port
features.description: Code should include a module that receives an interface instance through its port list
